name: AHG Observability Plugin
description: Prometheus-format /metrics exporter for AtoM. Exposes app, HTTP request, DB query and queue-depth metrics through a lightweight, auth-gated (bearer token OR IP allow-list) endpoint. Auto-selecting APCu/Redis/in-memory counter storage with graceful fallback. CLI commands sample queue depth and emit node_exporter textfiles.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd
features: Bearer-token OR IP allow-list authentication (fail-closed by default)
Auto-selecting metric storage: Redis (phpredis) -> APCu -> in-memory
HTTP request count + latency histogram per method/route/status
Queue backlog gauge sampled from ahg_queue_job
Zero external composer dependency, never 500s on a metrics fault

external_deps.ext-apcu: optional - cross-worker counters on a single host
